title: Browser WS input actions (ack)
description: Add interactive input actions to /api/browser/{thread_id}/stream (mouse click + scroll + keyboard press/type + navigate) and always reply with ack {id, ok}. Include unit tests with dummy sandbox sessions.

title: Browser WS stream: ack unsupported actions
description: Ensure /api/browser/{thread_id}/stream always replies with an ack for unsupported or unknown action values (when client includes id), to prevent UI timeouts in Control mode. Add regression test.

title: BrowserViewer Control: touch scroll + better key mapping
description: Enhance BrowserViewer Control mode: support touch interactions (tap=click, drag=scroll), improve keyboard mapping (special keys + modifier chords), avoid duplicate paste handling. Add unit tests for key normalization utilities.

title: Browser WS: add mouse move/down/up + viewport fallback
description: Extend /api/browser/{thread_id}/stream input handling: support mouse.move/down/up and coordinate mapping fallback (page.evaluate innerWidth/innerHeight) when viewport_size is missing. Add unit tests for each action and edge cases.

title: HITL tool approval: show args + reject/modify + resume schema
description: Enhance HITL tool approval flow: show pending tool calls (name + args), allow approve / reject / modify args, and resume graph with correct payload.
acceptance_criteria:
- Interrupt banner lists tool calls with args
- User can Approve (unchanged)
- User can Reject (resume with denial / stop)
- User can Modify tool args then Approve
- Backend validates & translates resume payload
- Tests cover payload + UI rendering

title: BrowserViewer: add Control mode (send WS input + show ack)
description: Implement frontend 'Control' toggle in BrowserViewer + useBrowserStream helpers to send mouse/scroll/keyboard/navigate actions to /api/browser/{thread_id}/stream, and surface ack status (success/failure) for UX + e2e.
